actuals.disclosures: Current incentives model for cross-chain swaps to Arbitrum One or Nova: 0,5 ARB - Minimum $50 cross-chain swap to Arbitrum One or Arbitrum Nova 1 ARB - Minimum $250 cross-chain swap to Arbitrum One or Arbitrum Nova 1,5 ARB - Minimum $1,000 cross-chain swap to Arbitrum One or Arbitrum Nova 2,5 ARB - Minimum $2,500 cross-chain swap to Arbitrum One or Arbitrum Nova 5 ARB - Minimum $10,000 cross-chain swap to Arbitrum One or Arbitrum Nova One user can receive no more than 10 ARB

Current incentives model for cross-chain swaps to Arbitrum One or Nova: 
0,5 ARB - Minimum $50 cross-chain swap to Arbitrum One or Arbitrum Nova
1 ARB - Minimum $250 cross-chain swap to Arbitrum One or Arbitrum Nova

2,5 ARB - Minimum $2,500 cross-chain swap to Arbitrum One or Arbitrum Nova
